en: The Spirit lifted me up and brought me to the east gate of the house of the LORD, which faces east. And behold, at the entrance of the gateway there were twenty-five men. And I saw among them Jaazaniah the son of Azzur, and Pelatiah the son of Benaiah, princes of the people.
zh: 靈把我提起來，帶到耶和華殿朝東的東門；在門口那裡有二十五個人；我看見他們中間有人民的領袖押朔的兒子雅撒尼亞和比拿雅的兒子毘拉提。

en: And he said to me, "Son of man, these are the men who devise iniquity and who give wicked counsel in this city;
zh: 耶和華對我說：“人子啊！這些就是圖謀罪孽，在這城裡設惡謀的人。

en: who say, 'The time is not near to build houses. This city is the cauldron, and we are the meat.'
zh: 他們說：‘建造房屋的時候還沒有到；這城是鍋，我們是肉。’

en: Therefore prophesy against them, prophesy, O son of man."
zh: 因此，人子啊！你要說預言，要說預言攻擊他們。”

en: And the Spirit of the LORD fell upon me, and he said to me, "Say, Thus says the LORD: So you think, O house of Israel. For I know the things that come into your mind.
zh: 耶和華的靈降在我身上，他對我說：“你要說：‘耶和華這樣說：以色列家啊！你們口裡所說、心中所想的，我都知道。

en: You have multiplied your slain in this city and have filled its streets with the slain.
zh: 你們在這城裡殺了許多人，使街道滿了死人。

en: Therefore thus says the Lord GOD: Your slain whom you have laid in the midst of it, they are the meat, and this city is the cauldron, but you shall be brought out of the midst of it.
zh: 因此，主耶和華這樣說：你們棄置在城中的死人就是肉，這城就是鍋；至於你們，卻要從城中被趕出去。

en: You have feared the sword, and I will bring the sword upon you, declares the Lord GOD.
zh: 你們懼怕刀劍，我就使刀劍臨到你們，這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: And I will bring you out of the midst of it, and give you into the hands of foreigners, and execute judgments upon you.
zh: 我要把你們從城中趕出去，交在外族人的手裡；我要向你們施行審判。

en: You shall fall by the sword. I will judge you at the border of Israel, and you shall know that I am the LORD.
zh: 你們必倒在刀下，我必審判你們，直到以色列的邊境；你們就知道我是耶和華。

en: This city shall not be your cauldron, nor shall you be the meat in the midst of it. I will judge you at the border of Israel,
zh: 這城必不作你們的鍋，你們也必不作其中的肉。我必審判你們直到以色列的邊境；

en: and you shall know that I am the LORD. For you have not walked in my statutes, nor obeyed my rules, but have acted according to the rules of the nations that are around you."
zh: 你們就知道我是耶和華。這是因為你們沒有遵行我的律例，也沒有遵守我的典章，卻效法你們周圍列國的習俗去行。’”

en: And it came to pass, while I was prophesying, that Pelatiah the son of Benaiah died. Then I fell down on my face and cried out with a loud voice and said, "Ah, Lord GOD! Will you make a full end of the remnant of Israel?"
zh: 我正在說預言的時候，比拿雅的兒子毘拉提死了。於是我臉伏在地，大聲呼叫，說：“哎，主耶和華啊！難道你要把以色列餘剩的人都盡行毀滅嗎？”

en: And the word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, your brothers, even your brothers, your kinsmen, the whole house of Israel, all of them, are those of whom the inhabitants of Jerusalem have said, 'Go far from the LORD; to us this land is given for a possession.'
zh: “人子啊！論到你的兄弟、你的親屬、與你一同被擄的人 和以色列全家，耶路撒冷的居民曾經這樣說：‘他們遠離了耶和華，這地是賜給我們作產業的。’

en: Therefore say, 'Thus says the Lord GOD: Though I removed them far off among the nations, and though I scattered them among the countries, yet I have been a sanctuary to them for a while in the countries where they have gone.'
zh: 因此你要說：‘主耶和華這樣說：我雖然把他們遠遠地遷到列國之中，使他們分散在各地，我還要在他們所到的各地暫作他們的聖所。’

en: Therefore say, 'Thus says the Lord GOD: I will gather you from the peoples and assemble you out of the countries where you have been scattered, and I will give you the land of Israel.'
zh: 因此你要說：‘主耶和華這樣說：我要從萬族中招聚你們，從你們被分散到的各地聚集你們，把以色列地賜給你們。’

en: And when they come there, they will remove from it all its detestable things and all its abominations.
zh: 他們必回到那裡，也必除掉那裡所有可厭的偶像和所有可憎之物。

en: And I will give them one heart, and a new spirit I will put within them. I will remove the heart of stone from their flesh and give them a heart of flesh,
zh: “我要把一顆心賜給他們，把新的靈放在他們裡面；我要從他們肉體中除掉石心，賜給他們肉心，

en: that they may walk in my statutes and keep my rules and obey them. And they shall be my people, and I will be their God.
zh: 使他們遵從我的律例，謹守遵行我的典章，這樣，他們就必作我的子民，我必作他們的 神。

en: But as for those whose heart goes after their detestable things and their abominations, I will bring their deeds upon their own heads, declares the Lord GOD."
zh: 至於那些心中隨從可厭的偶像和可憎之物的人，我要把他們所行的，報應在他們的頭上。”這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: Then the cherubim lifted up their wings, with the wheels beside them, and the glory of the God of Israel was over them.
zh: 以後，基路伯展開翅膀，輪子都在他們旁邊；在他們以上有以色列 神的榮耀。

en: And the glory of the LORD went up from the midst of the city and stood on the mountain that is on the east side of the city.
zh: 耶和華的榮耀從城中升起，停在城東的那座山上。

en: And the Spirit lifted me up and brought me in the vision by the Spirit of God into Chaldea, to the exiles. Then the vision that I had seen went up from me.
zh: 靈把我提起來，在異象中藉著 神的靈，領我到迦勒底被擄的人那裡去；我看見的異象就離開我上升去了。

en: And I told the exiles all the things that the LORD had shown me.
zh: 我就把耶和華指示我的一切事都說給被擄的人聽。
